title: SACRAMENTO, CA —
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: The Jacqueline Marie Zbur Rare Disease Advisory Council bill aims to create a Rare Disease Advisory Council (RDAC) in California.
Rare disease patients face unique challenges, including obtaining accurate diagnoses and accessing medical specialists.
The CalFresh for Board & Care Facilities bill will study the impact of extending CalFresh benefits to residents of board and care facilities.
Maintaining and growing board and care facilities is a key strategy to address homelessness in communities.
Residents of board and care facilities in California currently do not qualify for CalFresh benefits.
In-Home Supportive Services (IHSS) providers support home-bound aged, blind, and disabled individuals in California.
Current law mandates IHSS providers to pay for their criminal background checks, creating a financial burden on low-income workers.
The cost of criminal background checks for IHSS workers can amount to as much as $75.
